reference.transcript: Once upon a midnight dreary, while I pondered, weak and weary.

baseline.text: We hold the frame steady and move on the beat.

new_lines.text: The camera settles as the room grows quiet.
Keep the pace even and the breath controlled.
Across the hall, I can still hear every word.
The second cue arrives before the door closes.
At sunrise, we begin the next scene together.
The final cue arrives before the lights fade.
Mantenemos el encuadre firme y avanzamos con calma.
Nous gardons le cadre stable et avancons avec calme.
We hold the frame steady y seguimos con calma.
